about.title: About
about.subtitle: We're a passionate team of developers, designers, and innovators dedicated to creating exceptional appointment booking experiences that drive real business results.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.p1: It all started in late 2024, in the heart of Prishtina, Kosovo. Five passionate developers sat in a small café, frustrated by the endless phone calls and missed appointments they witnessed businesses struggling with every day. "There has to be a better way," said Etrit, and that spark of an idea would soon become Appointly-ks.
ourStory.p2: What began as late-night coding sessions and endless cups of coffee quickly evolved into something bigger. Lerdi brought his expertise in AI integration, dreaming of a chatbot that could handle bookings as naturally as a human receptionist. Fatlum, Jasin, and Marjan worked tirelessly on building a rock-solid backend that could handle thousands of appointments without breaking a sweat.
ourStory.p3: We started with a simple question:
ourStory.p3Highlight: "What if booking an appointment was as easy as sending a text?"
ourStory.p3End: Months of development, countless iterations, and hundreds of cups of coffee later, we had our answer. Appointly-ks was born – a platform that doesn't just schedule appointments, but transforms how businesses connect with their customers.
ourStory.p4: Today, we're proud to serve businesses across Kosovo and beyond, helping them save time, reduce no-shows, and focus on what they do best. But we're just getting started. Every day, we're working to make Appointly-ks smarter, faster, and more intuitive. Because for us, this isn't just a project – it's our mission to make scheduling effortless for everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower businesses of all sizes with intuitive scheduling tools that save time, reduce no-shows, and enhance customer satisfaction. We believe every minute saved on scheduling is a minute gained for what truly matters – serving your customers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted appointment management platform in the region, known for innovation, reliability, and exceptional user experience. We're building a future where scheduling is so seamless, it becomes invisible.

values.passionDesc: We love what we do and it shows in every feature we deliver.
values.innovationDesc: Staying ahead with AI and cutting-edge scheduling technology.
values.clientDesc: Your success is our success. We build lasting partnerships.
values.qualityDesc: Uncompromising standards in every line of code.

milestones.title: Our Journey
milestones.2024: Appointly-ks founded in Prishtina with a vision to transform appointment booking
milestones.2025: Launched AI-powered chatbot and serving businesses across Kosovo
milestones.future: Making Appointly-ks the most trusted appointment management platform in the region

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about our services and process.

items.question: What are your business hours?
items.answer: We're available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CET. For urgent matters outside business hours, please email us and we'll respond as soon as possible.

items.question: How quickly will I get a response?
items.answer: We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For urgent technical issues, we aim to respond within 4 hours.

items.question: Do you offer demos?
items.answer: Yes! We'd be happy to provide a personalized demo of our platform. Simply select "Request a Demo" in the contact form and we'll schedule a demo at your convenience.

items.question: Can I get support in Albanian?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our team is fluent in both English and Albanian. Feel free to contact us in whichever language you're most comfortable with.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.content: Welcome to Appointly-ks ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our appointment booking platform operating in Kosovo.

s2.title: 2. Information We Collect
s2.businessDesc: When you register a business account, we collect:
businessItems: Business name, owner name, and contact information (email, phone)
Business logo (stored in our secure cloud storage)
Account credentials (email and securely hashed password)
s2.employeeDesc: Business accounts may add employee data including:
employeeItems: Employee name, email, phone, and role
s2.customerDesc: When customers book appointments, we collect:
customerItems: Name, email address, and phone number
s2.googleDesc: If you choose to connect your Google account for calendar synchronization, we collect:
googleItems: OAuth access and refresh tokens (securely stored)

s3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
s3.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our appointment booking services
Process appointment bookings and send confirmation emails
Send SMS notifications for appointment confirmations and reminders (via Twilio)
Synchronize appointments with Google Calendar (when enabled)
Enable business dashboard analytics and reporting
Provide customer support and respond to inquiries
Send password reset and email verification communications
Display business location on maps (using Google Maps)
Comply with legal obligations

s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
s4.intro: We use the following third-party services to operate our platform:

items.name: Supabase
items.desc: Database hosting, user authentication, and file storage

items.name: Twilio
items.desc: SMS notifications for appointment confirmations and reminders

items.name: Gmail/SMTP
items.desc: Transactional email delivery (confirmations, password resets)

items.name: Google OAuth
items.desc: Optional sign-in and calendar integration

items.name: Google Maps
items.desc: Business address display and location services

items.name: Netlify
items.desc: Application hosting and serverless functions

s4.note: Each of these services has their own privacy policies. We recommend reviewing them for more information about their data practices.

s5.title: 5. Information Sharing and Disclosure
s5.intro: We may share your information with:

items.name: Service Providers
items.desc: Third-party companies that help us operate our platform (as listed above)

items.name: Business-Customer Relationship
items.desc: Customer information is shared with the business they book appointments with

items.name: Legal Requirements
items.desc: When required by law or to protect our rights

items.name: Business Transfers
items.desc: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

s5.noSell: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

s6.title: 6. Data Storage and Security
s6.intro: Your data is stored securely using Supabase's infrastructure. We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures including:
items: Encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS)
Secure password hashing
OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow for authentication
Row-level security policies on database tables
Secure token storage for third-party integrations
s6.note: However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

s7.title: 7. Local Storage and Browser Data
s7.intro: We store the following data in your browser's local storage:

items.name: Authentication Session (Supabase Auth)
items.desc: Keeps you logged in and maintains your session security. Managed by Supabase authentication system using secure tokens.

items.name: User Profile
items.desc: Caches your profile information locally for faster page loads.

items.name: Language Preference
items.desc: Your selected language (English or Albanian).

s7.note: For more details, please see our Cookie Policy.

s8.title: 8. Your Rights and Choices
items: Access and receive a copy of your personal information
Correct or update your information through your profile settings
Delete your account and personal information
Disconnect Google Calendar integration at any time
Opt-out of SMS notifications
Clear browser storage through your browser settings
s8.contactInfo: To exercise these rights, please contact us at

s9.title: 9. Data Retention
s9.content: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. Appointment records are retained for business reporting purposes. When you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your information within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

s10.title: 10. Children's Privacy
s10.content: Our services are not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

s11.title: 11. Changes to This Privacy Policy
s11.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically.

s12.title: 12. Contact Us
s12.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:

s1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
s1.content: By accessing and using Appointly-ks ("Service," "Platform," "we," "us," or "our"), you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our Service. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service.

s2.title: 2. Description of Service
s2.intro: Appointly-ks is an appointment booking platform that enables businesses in Kosovo to manage appointments, employees, and services while allowing customers to book appointments online. Our Service includes:
items: Business dashboard for managing appointments, services, and employees
Online appointment scheduling and calendar management
Email and SMS notifications for appointment confirmations and reminders
Optional Google Calendar synchronization
Customer booking interface with service selection
Business analytics and reporting features
Review and rating system

s3.title: 3. User Accounts
s3.registrationIntro: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You agree to:
registrationItems: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
Verify your email address to activate your account
Maintain and update your information to keep it accurate
Maintain the security of your password and account
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account
Be responsible for all activities under your account
s3.businessAccount: Business Accounts: For businesses offering appointment-based services. Includes access to dashboard, employee management, service configuration, and analytics.
s3.guestBooking: Guest Booking: Customers can book appointments without creating an account by providing contact information.

s4.title: 4. Service Plans and Pricing
s4.intro: Appointly-ks offers the following service plans:

items.name: Free Plan
items.desc: Basic appointment scheduling with limited features, up to 50 appointments per month and 2 employees

items.name: Starter Plan (€9.99/month)
items.desc: Unlimited appointments, up to 5 employees, email reminders, and basic analytics

items.name: Professional Plan (€24.99/month)
items.desc: All features including unlimited employees, SMS reminders, advanced analytics, priority support, and custom branding

s4.note: Paid plans are currently under development. All users currently have access to free tier features. We will notify registered users when paid features become available.

s5.title: 5. Acceptable Use Policy
items: Use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
Violate any laws in your jurisdiction, including Kosovo law
Infringe on intellectual property rights
Transmit harmful code, viruses, or malware
Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its servers
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Create fake or misleading business profiles
Book fake appointments or abuse the booking system
Use automated systems to access the Service excessively
Scrape, copy, or reproduce content without permission

s6.title: 6. Appointments and Bookings
forBusinessesItems: You are responsible for maintaining accurate availability and working hours
You must honor confirmed appointments or provide reasonable notice of cancellation
You must provide accurate service descriptions, durations, and pricing
You are responsible for the quality of services provided to customers
You must respond to customer inquiries in a timely manner
forCustomersItems: You must provide accurate contact information when booking
You must arrive on time for appointments
You may cancel appointments within one hour of booking through the provided cancellation link
You agree to the business's individual cancellation and service policies
You are responsible for any fees charged by the business for services rendered

s7.title: 7. Third-Party Integrations
s7.intro: Our Service integrates with third-party services. By using these integrations, you agree to their respective terms:

items.name: Google Calendar
items.desc: When you connect your Google account, you authorize us to create, read, and update calendar events on your behalf

items.name: SMS Notifications
items.desc: By providing a phone number, you consent to receive appointment-related SMS messages via Twilio

items.name: Email Communications
items.desc: You will receive transactional emails related to your account and appointments

s7.note: You may disconnect Google Calendar integration at any time through your account settings.

s8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
s8.content1: The Service, including all content, features, and functionality, is owned by Appointly-ks and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
s8.content2: You retain ownership of content you create or upload (such as business logos, service descriptions, and profile information), but grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide license to use, store, and display it as necessary to provide the Service.

s9.title: 9. Privacy and Data Protection
s9.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of personal information is described in our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you consent to our data practices as described in the Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy.

s10.title: 10. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability
s10.asIsContent: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
s10.platformIntro: Appointly-ks is a platform that connects businesses with customers. We are not responsible for:
platformItems: The quality of services provided by businesses
Accuracy of business information provided by users
s10.limitationContent: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Appointly-ks shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenues, data, or goodwill resulting from your use of the Service.

s11.title: 11. Indemnification
s11.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Appointly-ks and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of any rights of another.

s12.title: 12. Termination
s12.intro: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the Service immediately, without prior notice, for:
items: Violation of these Terms
Fraudulent or illegal activity
Abuse of the booking system
At our discretion for any reason with reasonable notice
s12.note: You may cancel your account at any time by contacting us. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

s13.title: 13. Changes to Terms
s13.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by posting the updated Terms on the Service and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

s14.title: 14. Governing Law
s14.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Kosovo, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of the Service shall be resolved in the courts of Prishtina, Kosovo.

s15.title: 15. Contact Information
s15.intro: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

s1.title: 1. What Are Cookies and Local Storage?
s1.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit websites. Local storage is a similar technology that allows websites to store data in your browser. Appointly-ks primarily uses local storage (not traditional cookies) to enhance your experience and provide essential functionality.

s2.title: 2. What We Store in Your Browser
s2.essentialDesc: These are necessary for the platform to function properly. You cannot opt-out of these as they are required for basic functionality.

essentialItems.name: Authentication Session (Supabase Auth)
essentialItems.desc: Keeps you logged in and maintains your session security. Managed by Supabase authentication system using secure tokens.

essentialItems.name: User Profile Data
essentialItems.desc: Caches your profile information locally for faster page loads.

s2.preferenceDesc: These remember your preferences and settings.

preferenceItems.name: Language Preference
preferenceItems.desc: Remembers your selected language (English or Albanian).

s3.title: 3. Third-Party Services
s3.intro: The following third-party services may set their own cookies or store data when you use our platform:

items.name: Supabase
items.desc: Our authentication and database provider. Supabase stores authentication tokens securely in local storage to maintain your login session.

items.name: Google Services (Optional)
items.desc: If you connect your Google account for calendar synchronization, Google may set cookies for authentication purposes. Additionally, Google Maps embeds may set cookies when viewing business locations.

items.name: Netlify
items.desc: Our hosting provider may set cookies for security and performance purposes.

s4.title: 4. What We Do NOT Use
s4.intro: To be transparent, we want to clarify that we currently do NOT use:
items: Google Analytics or other website analytics tracking
Advertising or marketing cookies
Social media tracking pixels
Retargeting or behavioral advertising technologies
Cross-site tracking cookies
s4.note: If we add any of these services in the future, we will update this policy and provide appropriate notice.

s5.title: 5. Storage Duration
s5.sessionContent: Authentication tokens are refreshed automatically and persist until you log out or clear your browser data. Supabase sessions have configurable expiration times for security.
s5.preferenceContent: Language preferences persist indefinitely until you change them or clear your browser's local storage.

s6.title: 6. Managing Your Browser Storage
s6.clearingIntro: You can clear the data we store by:
clearingItems: Logging out of your account (clears session data)
Using your browser's "Clear Site Data" feature
Clearing your browser's local storage through developer tools
s6.browserIntro: To manage local storage and cookies in your browser:
browserItems: Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Site Settings → View permissions and data stored across sites
Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data → Manage Data
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Manage and delete cookies and site data

s7.title: 7. Impact of Clearing Storage
s7.intro: If you clear your browser's local storage for our site:
items: You will be logged out and need to sign in again
Your language preference will reset to the default
You will need to reconnect any Google Calendar integration
s7.note: Your account data, appointments, and business information are stored on our servers and will not be affected by clearing browser storage.

s8.title: 8. Updates to This Policy
s8.content: We may update this Cookie Policy when we add new features or third-party integrations. We will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

s9.title: 9. More Information
s9.content: For more information about how we handle your personal data, please review our Privacy Policy.

s10.title: 10. Contact Us
s10.intro: If you have any questions about our use of cookies and local storage, please contact us:

aiChatbot.heroSubtitle: Our intelligent chatbot uses OpenAI's GPT-3.5 Turbo to provide natural, conversational booking experiences. Click the chat bubble to see it in action!

naturalConversation.title: Natural Conversation
naturalConversation.description: Chat naturally with our AI assistant. No complex forms or rigid interfaces - just talk like you would to a real person.

smartUnderstanding.title: Smart Understanding
smartUnderstanding.description: Our AI understands context, remembers your preferences, and can handle complex booking requests with ease.

instantBooking.title: Instant Booking
instantBooking.description: Once you provide all the details, the AI can book your appointment immediately. No waiting, no delays.
